title: St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly
tagline: St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly, Kerala

overview.short: St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica is a basilica of the Syro-Malabar Catholic Church situated in Angamaly, Kerala, India. On 24 June 2009, Pope Benedict XVI raised St George Forane Church to the status of minor basilica. Together with an underground parish hall where wedding gatherings are commonly held, it covers about 24,000 sq ft (2,200 m2).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Jacobite Soonoro Cathedral, Angamaly
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Soonoro Cathedral, or Angamaly Cheriyapally, is an ancient Jacobite Syrian church located in Angamaly.

image.alt: St. Mary's Jacobite Soonoro Cathedral, Angamaly

topPlaces.name: Mar Hormizd Syro-Malabar Cathedral, Angamaly
topPlaces.description: Mar Hormizd Cathedral, locally known as the Eastern Church of Angamaly (Malayalam: അങ്കമാലി കിഴക്കേപ്പള്ളി, romanized: Angamali Kiḻakkeppaḷḷi) or the Cathedral Church (Malayalam: അരമനപള്ളി, romanized: Aramanappaḷḷi), is a Syro-Malabar church in Angamaly, India. It was built in 1578 by Mar Abraham, the last East Syriac Metropolitan to reach the Malabar Coast.

topPlaces.name: Angamaly
topPlaces.description: Angamaly (Malayalam pronunciation: [ɐŋgɐmɐːli]) is a municipality in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. Angamaly is part of the Kochi metropolitan area and is located northeast of the Kochi city centre.

topPlaces.name: Kothakulangara
topPlaces.description: Kothakulangara is a village in Kerala, India, situated 400 m (¼ mile) north of Angamali town on the National Highway 47, in Ernakulam District, Kerala, India. Wards No 2, 3 and 4 of Angamali Municipality are included in Kothakulangara.

topPlaces.name: Athanasius Paulose II
topPlaces.description: Athanasius Paulose (27 June 1915 – 7 March 1991) was the First Metropolitan of Evangelistic Association of the East. He was consecrated as Metropolitan in 1973.

topPlaces.name: Kidangoor, Ernakulam
topPlaces.description: Kidangoor is a small village in Thuravoor Panchayath near Angamaly in Eranakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Kidangoor consists of vast agricultural area near Angamaly town, in Thuravoor Panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Karukutty
topPlaces.description: Karukutty is a village panchayat in Aluva Taluk, Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. Classified as a Grade A panchayat, Karukutty comprises 17 wards and falls under Angamaly block panchayat in Aluva taluk.

topPlaces.name: Chirakkal Mahadeva temple
topPlaces.description: Chirakkal Mahadeva temple in Kerala, India is the 108th Shiva temple in India. The main deity in this temple is Lord Shiva and He is in Rowdra bhavam in this temple.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — St. Mary's Jacobite Soonoro Cathedral, Angamaly & around

items.activity: St. Mary's Jacobite Soonoro Cathedral, Angamaly
items.note: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Soonoro Cathedral, or Angamaly Cheriyapally, is an ancient Jacobite Syrian church located in Angamaly.

Mar Hormizd Cathedral, locally known as the Eastern Church of Angamaly (Malayalam: അങ്കമാലി കിഴക്കേപ്പള്ളി, romanized: Angamali Kiḻakkeppaḷḷi) or the Cathedral Church (Malayalam: അരമനപള്ളി, romanized: Aramanappaḷḷi), is a Syro-Malabar church in Angamaly, India. It was built in 1578 by Mar Abraham, the last East Syriac Metropolitan to reach the Malabar Coast.

Angamaly (Malayalam pronunciation: [ɐŋgɐmɐːli]) is a municipality in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. Angamaly is part of the Kochi metropolitan area and is located northeast of the Kochi city centre.

Kothakulangara is a village in Kerala, India, situated 400 m (¼ mile) north of Angamali town on the National Highway 47, in Ernakulam District, Kerala, India. Wards No 2, 3 and 4 of Angamali Municipality are included in Kothakulangara.
Athanasius Paulose (27 June 1915 – 7 March 1991) was the First Metropolitan of Evangelistic Association of the East. He was consecrated as Metropolitan in 1973.

Kidangoor is a small village in Thuravoor Panchayath near Angamaly in Eranakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Kidangoor consists of vast agricultural area near Angamaly town, in Thuravoor Panchayath.

Karukutty is a village panchayat in Aluva Taluk, Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. Classified as a Grade A panchayat, Karukutty comprises 17 wards and falls under Angamaly block panchayat in Aluva taluk.
Chirakkal Mahadeva temple in Kerala, India is the 108th Shiva temple in India. The main deity in this temple is Lord Shiva and He is in Rowdra bhavam in this temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (27 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly?
faq.a: Stays in St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. George Syro-Malabar Catholic Basilica, Angamaly?
faq.a: The top attractions are St. Mary's Jacobite Soonoro Cathedral, Angamaly, Mar Hormizd Syro-Malabar Cathedral, Angamaly, Angamaly, Kothakulangara, Athanasius Paulose II.
